site.title: Hyperloop UPV
site.description: Hyperloop UPV designs and validates high-speed transportation systems through real engineering and testing.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: We design and develop Hyperloop systems combining engineering, innovation and real tests to push the boundaries of high-speed transport.

team.title: Faces behind the pod
team.subtitle: A growing crew of engineers, designers, and makers pushing the pod forward. Scroll to glimpse more of the people building the future.

vehicles.title: Vehicle Timeline
vehicles.subtitle: Our latest creations, the pods that take flight

partners.title: Powered by your support
partners.body: We are powered by our sponsors and partners. If you want to help make this project a reality, consider supporting us!

footer.title: Shaping the Future.

subsystems.title: Subsystems
